scripts.build:mobile: tsc -b tsconfig.mobile.json && vite build --mode mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.build:release: BC_RELEASE_BUILD=1 node scripts/detect-ips.mjs && BC_RELEASE_BUILD=1 tsc -b tsconfig.mobile.json && BC_RELEASE_BUILD=1 vite build --mode mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:dev:ios: BA_CAP_PORT=${BA_BACKEND_PORT:-${BETTER_AGENT_BACKEND_PORT:-${BETTER_CLAUDE_BACKEND_PORT:-18765}}}; VITE_API_URL=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):$BA_CAP_PORT vite build && npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:dev:android: BA_CAP_PORT=${BA_BACKEND_PORT:-${BETTER_AGENT_BACKEND_PORT:-${BETTER_CLAUDE_BACKEND_PORT:-18765}}}; VITE_API_URL=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):$BA_CAP_PORT vite build && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:prod:ios: BA_CAP_PORT=${BA_BACKEND_PORT:-${BETTER_AGENT_BACKEND_PORT:-${BETTER_CLAUDE_BACKEND_PORT:-18765}}}; BA_CAP_URL=${CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL:-${VITE_API_URL:?Set CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL or VITE_API_URL explicitly - no default server URL is baked in}}; VITE_API_URL=$BA_CAP_URL CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=$BA_CAP_URL vite build && CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=$BA_CAP_URL npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:prod:android: BA_CAP_PORT=${BA_BACKEND_PORT:-${BETTER_AGENT_BACKEND_PORT:-${BETTER_CLAUDE_BACKEND_PORT:-18765}}}; BA_CAP_URL=${CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL:-${VITE_API_URL:?Set CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL or VITE_API_URL explicitly - no default server URL is baked in}}; VITE_API_URL=$BA_CAP_URL CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=$BA_CAP_URL vite build && CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL=$BA_CAP_URL npx cap sync && npx cap open android
